the mouth the mind the hand the heart
this is how i find my art
the aye the eye the i the ah
the words i use to wonder why

cuz you watch me learn to fly
and i can bend and i can break
careful bout the road i take
know i mean the things i say
cuz i'm tryin to find a way
when i find it can't be stopped
til i reach the very top
of the mountain but who's countin

up the mountain down the mountain
from the valleys to the sum

bangin with the rocks i mined
the feet the fang the fingertip
this is how i keep my grip

the feet the fang the fingertip
this is how i keep my grip

windows through which i watch the sky

the would i use to keep me try

if you can't come then what's the use

cuz you're the root i come back to

this is how i do my part
